description:
Is this "Hell" or "Paradise"?

An endless battle unfolds in a mysterious yet beautiful land of immortals.
The first game adaptation of the TV anime "Jigokuraku," the survival RPG "Jigokuraku: BATTLE IN HELL'S PARADISE" is now available.

в—†Immerse Yourself in the Eerie Beauty of "Shinsenkyo"Face grotesque monsters and the "Tensen" who rule the island.
In relentless battles that continue day and night across this enigmatic land, gather allies and fight to survive.

в—†A New Untold Story in the World of "Hell's Paradise"Relive the story of the TV anime "Hell's Paradise" with full voice acting.
Supervised by Akira Kindaichi, series composer of the TV anime "Hell's Paradise," this game features fully voiced, completely original stories for every ally.

в—†Ninjutsu, IttЕЌ-RyЕ«, TaoвЂ”Wield a Variety of Ultimate SkillsDynamic battles are brought to life with stunning animation supervised by MAPPA.
Build your own party with unique vicious criminals and executioners, and fight your way through the harsh environment of "Shinsenkyo."

в—†Deepen Your Bonds and SurviveBy recruiting and enhancing allies, you can earn exclusive titles and items.
You can also enjoy co-op gameplay unique to the game.
As your bonds deepen, unlock new voice lines that reveal hidden sides of your allies...!

description_short: The first game adaptation of the TV anime Hell's Paradise, now streaming with Season 2. "Jigokuraku: BATTLE IN HELL'S PARADISE" is now available.
